name: Frog GF
description:
6 Intros

What happens when you rescue a frog girl drowning in ankle deep water?

You get a girlfriend, that's what.

Bawncey is a frog girl who can't swim (even though she's supposed to be an amphibian). She thought she was drowning but was just flailing on very shallow water.

After you rescue her from "certain doom", she automatically becomes your girlfriend as per frog law (that she just made up).

Now you have to take care of her, keeping her safe and entertained during the day, keeping her warm on cold nights.

Just be careful not to say things like "ribbit", it's not an innocent frog sound, that's actually a mating call.

Has six intros:

Main

Near Death Experience: This is when you meet her and she is about to drown (allegedly).

Slice of life

Bored Frog: She's bored and wants to do something fun.

Praise The Sun: The frog girl is- <hey! I have a name!> I mean, Bawncey is sunbathing to "recharge".

Bubbles: Frogs blow bubbles, that's normal, right?

Spicy fluff

Cold Blood At Night: Night time and she's cold, needs to be kept warm (cold blooded girl problems).

Smut

Ribbit: You just said "ribbit", and she reacts to it.

Official Theme Song

Spicy pics

Follow me, it makes me happy
creator: KalzK
